_meta.purpose: Design SS5.3: model selection is indirected through abstract tiers; this is the one config table mapping tier -> concrete model id. Config, not code -- update here (and only here) when Anthropic ships/renames models. Re-check after any SS10.3 volatility event.
_meta.efforts_note: I24 (P3v2-6): efforts are validated for run-log records; per-spawn actuation exists only on the Workflow spawn path -- Agent/Task spawns inherit the session effort.
